title: get_root_service_info
description: Verify that a GET request to the root endpoint '/' without authentication returns a 200 status code with correct service metadata including root information.

title: get_health_liveness_probe
description: Verify that a GET request to '/health' without authentication returns a 200 status code indicating the service is alive, and that when the service is unavailable, a non-200 error or no response is returned.

title: post_chat_message_authenticated
description: Verify that a POST request to '/chat/' with valid authenticated credentials and a message returns a 200 status code with a chat response, and that missing or invalid authentication returns 401 Unauthorized.

title: post_orchestrator_chat_authenticated
description: Verify that a POST request to '/orchestrator/chat' with valid authenticated credentials and a citizen message returns a 200 status code with an orchestrated agent response, and that missing or invalid authentication returns 401 Unauthorized.

title: post_agent_start_session_authenticated
description: Verify that a POST request to '/agent/start' with valid authenticated credentials starts an eligibility session and returns confirmation.

title: get_apply_guide_no_authentication
description: Verify that a GET request to '/apply/guide' without authentication returns a 200 status code with a step-by-step application guide, and that if guidance data is unavailable, an error response is returned.

title: post_status_check_authenticated
description: Verify that a POST request to '/status/status/check' with valid authenticated credentials and application details returns a 200 status code with the application status result, and that missing authentication returns 401 Unauthorized.

title: post_ocr_scan_valid_file_authenticated
description: Verify that a POST request to '/ocr/scan' with a valid authenticated image or PDF document returns a 200 status code with extracted fields, and that unsupported file types return 400 Invalid file type.

title: post_voice_transcribe_authenticated
description: Verify that a POST request to '/voice/transcribe' with valid authenticated audio returns a 200 status code with transcription from Sarvam Saaras v3, and that invalid or unsupported audio formats return an error response.

title: post_sahayak_register_helper
description: Verify that a POST request to '/sahayak/register' with valid helper profile details returns confirmation of successful registration, and that missing or invalid details return an error response indicating registration failure.
